title: HEM Incense Box - (6 pack = 120 sticks) (Lord Buddha)
description: Product Description Hem Incense Box – Lord Buddha Historically, Lord Buddha fragrance is a secret recipe handed down through generations to be able to induce a calming, relaxing and focused frame of mind. HEM Incense leverages this historic belief to present these fragrant incense sticks. Role of fragrance in mood management: Since centuries, it is believed that fragrances have a direct impact on mood and several scientific researches have shown that fragrances make a significant impact on mood upliftment. Based on a traditional fragrance formula handed down through generations, this is a mild, sweet and persistent fragrance. Hem Incense Sticks - Lord Buddha Hem Incense Box Established in 1983, HEM has gained exports to 72 countries due to the natural, pure and powerful fragrances in many products. Over the course of 30 years, HEM as a company has been exporting to over 70 countries; products manufactured in their facilities at Mumbai and Bangalore Based on traditional knowledge of fragrances Hem Corporation has 30+ years of experience in the production of fragrance using products Hem Incense Box – Lord Buddha Role of fragrance in mood management It is believed that fragrances have a direct impact on mood and several scientific researches have shown that fragrances make a significant impact on mood upliftment. Fragrant incense sticks for pleasant odour and inducing calmness, mild, persistent and sweet fragrance Usage: Place in any convenient location away from sources of inflammation. Place the lit incense stick in the incense holder. Gifting: Combined with brass inlaid sesame wooden incense holder, it makes for a unique gifting concept Storage: Store away from inflammable areas Dimensions: 25.6 x 9.3 x 6 cm, Weight: 299 gms Number of units: 120 sticks Burning time: 35-45 minutes Gifting Combine this powerful traditional calming fragrant incense pack from HEM Incense with our beautiful sesame wood coffin incense burner is ideal to gift for any occasion. The inlayed brass gives it an elegant touch. Mood uplifter Historically, Lord Buddha fragrance is a secret recipe handed down through generations to be able to induce a calming, relaxing and focused frame of mind. HEM Incense brings to you this mild, sweet and persistent fragrance. Fights Foul Odours Nothing compares to coming back to a beautiful looking and lovely smelling home. Hem Incense Lord Buddha Sticks are just the right support system for every proud home owner Legal Disclaimer This product is meant to be used for the stated purpose of fragrant incense sticks and dhoop sticks only. This product should not be used differently to the usage instructions. Storage: Incense sticks are always to be stored in cool, dark, dry, non-inflammable areas Usage Care: Never light incense or dhoop sticks around or with inflammable objects like wires, wood; use these only with proper incense or dhoop stands Allergy testing: For persons prone to allergies, it is always recommended to test for allergy by first using the incense or dhoop stick for about 5 minutes. Always opt for incense or dhoop fragrances one is not allergic to. There are many choices and types of dhoop fragrances available.
